content:
O ṣe pataki lati ṣalaye diẹ ninu awọn ọrọ lati dahun ibeere rẹ ni deede:

- O n ṣe ayẹwo iwa-ipa (vibration) ipele rẹ lori pendulum tabili nipa lilo onínọmbà ìmọ́lẹ̀ àtọka Kessler (Kessler-type optical lever analysis) ni igbohunsafẹfẹ 0.01 Hz.
- Iyatọ Allan (Allan deviation) ti wa ni iwọn kekere pupọ, ni isalẹ 10^-9 ni apapọ iṣẹju-aaya 100.
- O n beere boya o yẹ ki o yipada si ọna asopọ agbekalẹ-agbekalẹ (fractional frequency link, tabi phase-locked loop, tabi ọna asopọ agbekalẹ miiran) ṣaaju ṣiṣe ayẹwo atẹle.

Ni gbogbogbo, nigbati o ba n ṣe onínọmbà
